allow: Bash(perl -pi -e 's/<div class="res-head" style="padding-top:0"><div class="res-head__title \([a-z-]+\)--\(win|loss|draw\)" style="font-size:24px">/<div class="res-head"><div class="res-head__title $1--$2">/g; s/<div class="share\( share--[a-z]+\)?" style="margin-top:12px">/<div class="share$1">/g' design/pages/duel-result.html)

Bash(perl -pi -e 's/<button class="btn" style="background:var\\\(--minus\\\);color:#fff">/<button class="btn btn--danger">/g; s/<div class="modal" style="margin-top:8px;max-width:none">/<div class="modal" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" style="margin-top:8px;max-width:none">/g' design/pages/settings.html design/pages/admin/users.html)

Bash(perl -pi -e 's/<button class="btn" style="flex:1;padding:8px;background:var\\\(--minus\\\);color:#fff">/<button class="btn btn--danger" style="flex:1;padding:8px">/g' design/pages/admin/users.html)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/background: var\(--minus\); display: inline-block; animation: dd-pulse/background: var\(--timer\); display: inline-block; animation: dd-pulse/' design/pages/tournaments.html)

Bash(sshpass -e ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@62.113.109.191 'uname -a; echo ---; docker ps --format "table {{.Names}}\\t{{.Image}}\\t{{.Ports}}" 2>/dev/null; echo ---; df -h / ; free -h; nproc; echo ---; ls /etc/nginx/sites-enabled 2>/dev/null; ls /opt 2>/dev/null; ls /root 2>/dev/null')
Bash(git -c user.name=Rifferd -c user.email=neyttii@gmail.com commit -q -m 'chore: монорепо-фундамент — структура по ТЗ §12, дизайн-контракт, ADR-0001 *)
